title: Markdown View Mode Rendering
summary: Add proper markdown rendering in file view mode including mermaid.js diagrams, node mention chips, and standard markdown elements

acceptance_criteria.description: Mermaid code blocks render as SVG diagrams in view mode
Node mentions render as styled chips matching agent chat
Standard markdown (tables, code blocks, images) renders correctly
Edit mode remains raw text with no rendering

implementation_plan: Add mermaid.js dependency and create MermaidBlock component
Create NodeMentionChip component with same styling as agent chat
Create MarkdownRenderer using react-markdown with custom renderers
Integrate MarkdownRenderer into FileViewer for view mode only
test_plan: Test mermaid blocks produce SVG output
Test mention chips render with correct class names
Test edit mode shows raw text
risks: Agent chat chip styling may not be easily reusable
